package rulefixtures

import (
	"net/http"
	"sync"
)

// scenario for mutex_in_loop: Repeated Lock or RLock acquisition inside loops.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: concurrency; severity: contextual.
type Rule226PositiveRecord struct {
	mu sync.Mutex
	lastStatus string
}

func scenario226Positive(state *Rule226PositiveRecord, url string) error {
	state.mu.Lock()
	defer state.mu.Unlock()
	resp, err := http.Get(url)
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	defer resp.Body.Close()
	state.lastStatus = resp.Status
	return nil
}
